comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
Cockpit tests failed for commit 1e5194c8099c4ce0327a795e04775a8d7196efbf. @martinpitt, @jelly, @mvollmer please check.

The [cockpit rawhide test failure](https://artifacts.dev.testing-farm.io/2a197701-88e6-4b4b-924f-47d265e43744/) is a race condition on our side. I fixed it in https://github.com/cockpit-project/cockpit-podman/pull/1525 . Sorry about the noise! Please retry or ignore.

(There are several other build failures here, though.)
